mapper.select: SELECT GM.USER_ID AS "userId", GM.GROUP_ID AS "groupId", GM.ACCOUNT_ID AS "accountId", G.GROUP_NAME AS "groupName", UA.BALANCE AS "userBalance", GS.SUBSCRIPTION_FEE AS "subscriptionFee" FROM GROUP_MEMBERS GM JOIN GROUPS G ON GM.GROUP_ID = G.GROUP_ID JOIN GROUP_SETTINGS GS ON GM.GROUP_ID = GS.GROUP_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNTS UA ON GM.ACCOUNT_ID = UA.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE GS.DUE_DAY = #{today} AND G.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND GM.MEMBER_STATUS = 'JOINED' AND GM.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL -- 개인계좌 연결된 멤버만 AND GS.SUBSCRIPTION_FEE > 0 -- 회비가 0원 초과인 그룹만 AND UA.BALANCE >= GS.SUBSCRIPTION_FEE -- 잔액 충분한 멤버만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRANSACTIONS T WHERE T.USER_ID = GM.USER_ID AND T.GROUP_ID = GM.GROUP_ID AND T.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'AUTO_TRANSFER' AND T.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(T.CREATED_AT, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') )
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, TARGET_ACCOUNT_ID, USER_ID, GROUP_ID, AMOUNT, TRANSACTION_TYPE, STATUS, PAYMENT_REFERENCE_UID, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{transactionId}, (SELECT ACCOUNT_ID FROM GROUP_ACCOUNT WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}), #{userId}, #{groupId}, #{amount}, 'AUTO_TRANSFER', #{status}, #{merchantUid}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
